title: Burrow Recall
short_description: A carrot hides under one burrow, then the burrows shuffle and swap. Keep your eyes locked on the right one and tap it when they stop!
description: Bunny buries a carrot under one of the burrows — then the burrows start sliding and swapping places, and it's all down to your eyes and your memory to keep track of the right one. When they finally stop, tap the burrow you think still hides the carrot. It trains spatial working memory and focused attention — following a moving target and holding its place in your mind — which is a different memory muscle from matching pairs. Grade bands ramp from three slow burrows, to four quicker ones, to five fast-shuffling burrows. Tracking the carrot and building streaks earns bonus points. A free online spatial memory and concentration game for kids in grades 1–5, feeding your score and GP on OnlyGrins.
controls: Watch the burrows shuffle, then tap the one hiding the carrot.
